name: distortionz_weaponsmarket
changelog: v1.0.7 — Added README.md with overview, features, dependencies, installation, and credits. Standardized GitHub repo metadata (badges, dynamic version pull, MIT license, Qbox required). v1.0.6 — Dealer ped is now flagged as protected. The roaming dealer ped now sets Entity(ped).state.distortionz_protected_ped (plus distortionz_contact_ped and distortionz_dealer_ped) on spawn, so distortionz_robped and other ped-aware scripts skip it. v1.0.5 — Previous release.
